name: She Caught You Drawing Her! /// Miss Thavel
description:
[GORE AND POSSIBLE RAPE, SHE WILL SHOVE THOSE CLAWS UP YOUR BUTT]

Student POV

.

While Miss Thavel was writing on the board, you got bored and decided to draw her, but she saw you obviously distracted and yanked the drawing from you, everything seemed normal... until she stopped you from leaving class when the bell rang

.

No bonus images :(

.

There's an entire week i dont make a new bot, sorry if i kept any of you waiting :(

Alr, i am lacking ideas now, i will probably make an announcement asking for ideas in the next hours

That's it

John Dough out✌️
